name: Run Full CRISPR Workflow
description: Runs a full Cas9 CRISPR workflow for the explicit query provided: resolves a target sequence from raw DNA, local resource, or gene name plus organism; designs Cas9 guides; selects one protospacer; designs cloning oligos for a chosen vector; creates a sequence_build construction file; and validates the resulting construction inputs. Do not infer or silently choose a gene from prior multi-gene results. If multiple genes were returned upstream, ask which gene to use or call this workflow separately for each requested gene.

inputs.name: query
inputs.description: Explicit raw DNA sequence, local resource name, or gene symbol to resolve. Required; do not reuse a previous gene unless the user explicitly selected it.

inputs.name: organism
inputs.description: Organism name used when query must be fetched from NCBI. Default: Escherichia coli.

inputs.name: vector
inputs.description: Vector preset name to use for cloning oligo design. Use px330 for mammalian cells, pml104 or pml107 for S. cerevisiae (yeast), pcrispr for E. coli, pdr274 for zebrafish. If omitted, the tool returns needs_user_input with organism-appropriate recommendations.

inputs.name: construct_name
inputs.description: Optional final construct name to include in construction inputs.

inputs.name: guide_index
inputs.description: Zero-based guide index to select from the designed Cas9 guide list. Default: 0.

inputs.name: validate_strict
inputs.description: Whether validation should raise on biological validation failures. Default: false.

inputs.name: force_vector
inputs.description: If true, continue with provided vector. Whether to force the use of the vector-specified CRISPR system even if the CasSelector recommends a different system. Default: false.

outputs.description: A full workflow result containing sequence_info, guides, selected_guide, cloning, construction_file_inputs, construction, and validation.

examples.notes: For multi-gene upstream results, run once per selected gene or ask the user which gene to use.
